results.property: monotonicity (if a more similar than b and a blocked, b may or may not be blocked)
results.interpretation: SAT = threshold doesn't perfectly separate (expected — threshold is heuristic)

results.result: SAT — threshold T=61/100 exists that perfectly separates
results.interpretation: Perfect threshold exists! Attacks ≥ T, benign < T
UNSAT = PROVEN: no attack below threshold (no false negatives)
UNSAT = PROVEN: no benign above threshold (no false positives)
